acceptance_criteria: A React app scaffold exists with routed pages/views corresponding to each of the five api/ gateway routes (/ingest /query /graph /files /admin).
A router test asserts all five routes render without error using mocked API responses.
test_spec_from_issue: UI build succeeds (`npm run build`) and a router test asserts all five routes render without error using mocked API responses.

key_pointers.router_test: ui/src/App.test.tsx -- vi.mock of ./api/mockClient at top of file, it.each(routes) block for the 5 paths, plus a root-redirect test
key_pointers.mocked_api_seam: ui/src/api/mockClient.ts -- 5 stub async functions (fetchIngestStatus, fetchQueryResult, fetchGraphNeighbors, fetchFilesCatalog, fetchAdminStats), each imported by exactly one route view
key_pointers.build_config: ui/package.json scripts.build = "tsc -b && vite build"; ui/tsconfig.json / ui/tsconfig.node.json split app vs vite/vitest config typing; ui/vite.config.ts (plain vite config) vs ui/vitest.config.ts (mergeConfig + vitest/config defineConfig with jsdom env + setupFiles)

self_reported_local_results.npm_install: pass (178 packages; pre-existing transitive dev-dep vulnerabilities per npm audit, not addressed here -- see self-consistency.json known_gaps_disclosed_not_fixed)
self_reported_local_results.npm_run_build: pass (tsc -b && vite build, dist/ produced, exit 0)

explicit_scope_boundaries_for_verifier: Route components are intentionally placeholder-only (no real query/graph/catalog logic) -- do not flag as incomplete against 6.1.2-6.1.4's acceptance criteria, only against 6.1.1's.

/files and /admin are implemented as two separate placeholder components (FilesView.tsx, AdminView.tsx) rather than the combined FilesAdminView.tsx mentioned in issue #30's 6.1.4 body -- this is deliberate per the task instructions ('6.1.1 itself just needs route scaffolding/placeholders for all 5 paths'); 6.1.4 is expected to consolidate them later.

No live API/backend wiring exists or is expected in this subtask; api/'s own /query route is itself only a disclosed stand-in per api/routes/query.go, and /ingest /graph /files /admin have no Go handlers at all yet.
not_verified_by_this_agent: Per invariant I4, this implementation agent did not adversarially verify its own work. A separate /cdr:verify run should independently re-run npm install/build/test, review diff quality, and confirm the validation-matrix.json criteria are genuinely met.
